    /**
     * @typedef {string | number} Whatever
     */
    
    class Conn {
        constructor() {}
        item = 3;
        method() {}
    }
    
    module.exports = Conn;

     * @typedef {import("./conn")} Conn

    class Wrap {
        /**
         * @param {Conn} c
         */
        constructor(c) {
            this.connItem = c.item;
